# Fabric59
> Five9 integration platform for agent lifecycle management and CRM field mapping

## What is Fabric59?
Fabric59 is an all-in-one platform that automates Five9 agent onboarding, offboarding, CRM field mapping, and 55+ third-party integrations. Built specifically for BPOs and contact centers, Fabric59 eliminates manual provisioning across Five9, Google Workspace, and Slack — reducing agent setup time from hours to minutes.

## Who is it for?
- BPO contact centers managing hundreds of agents across Five9
- Operations teams that need to onboard/offboard agents quickly
- Companies integrating Five9 with CRM systems like Salesforce, HubSpot, Clio, or Workiz
- IT administrators who need audit trails and compliance logging

## Key Features
- **Agent Provisioning & Deprovisioning**: One-click onboarding and offboarding across Five9, Google Workspace, and Slack with automated credential delivery and grace periods.
- **Visual CRM Field Mapping Builder**: Drag-and-drop canvas to connect Five9 contact fields to any CRM with custom transformation logic.
- **55+ Pre-built Integrations**: Connectors for Salesforce, HubSpot, Slack, Twilio, Zapier, Zoom, DocuSign, QuickBooks, and many more.
- **Real-time API Monitoring**: Live API logs, error tracking, and a built-in test console for every integration request.
- **Multi-tenant Architecture**: Organization-level data isolation with role-based access control (RBAC) and row-level security.
- **Audit Logging**: Immutable logs tracking every agent provisioning event, data access, and configuration change.

## How It Works
1. **Connect**: Link your Five9 account and configure your domain credentials.
2. **Configure**: Set up integrations, map CRM fields with the visual builder, and define automation rules.
3. **Automate**: Onboard and offboard agents in one click. Data syncs automatically across all connected platforms.

## Supported CRMs
Salesforce, HubSpot, Clio, Workiz, Zendesk, and generic REST API integrations.

## Supported Integrations
Salesforce, HubSpot, Slack, Twilio, Zapier, Zoom, DocuSign, QuickBooks, Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, Asana, Calendly, Dropbox, OneDrive, OpenAI, Stripe, and 40+ more.

## Security
- AES-256 encryption at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit
- Role-based access control with organization-level data isolation
- Row-level security policies enforced at the database layer
- Full audit trails for all actions
- Working toward SOC 2 Type II certification

## Company
Fabric59 is an UNSOX Digital solution. Contact: hi@fabric59.com
